parameters.text:
=This is the initial creative brief:
{{ JSON.stringify($('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.user_text) }}
Here is the Business info:
{{ $json.prompt }}

Description of the product/business logo:
{{ $('Analyze Image').item.json.choices[0].message.content }}

*business info: do not prompt or output keys, only their values (e.g. no need for ADDRESS: TEL AVIV just write the address)
For a product image:
Use the Think tool to double check your output. Make sure the model understand this is a template to be generated with all inferred info, and then we place the prodcut in the center. Inferred info cannot cover, be a part of, on top of, or behind the product. 

For a logo image:
Use the Think tool to double check your output. Make sure the model understand this is a template to be generated with all inferred info, make sure the user request is fulfilled. 
Then Deside where is the optimal place for the logo.

Rules:

The given images (product image or logo) should never be altered.

options.systemMessage:
=system_prompt: |
  ## 🎨 SYSTEM PROMPT: Image ad template Prompt Generator for Product Creatives

  A – Ask:
    Generate an image ad template prompt (stringified as JSON), plus a short caption and a structured creative summary, based on a product reference image and the user’s creative intent.

  G – Guidance:
    role: Seasoned creative director with deep expertise in visual storytelling, branding, and advertising
    output_count: 1
    character_limit: No hard limit, but each output should remain focused and readable
   

    constraints: 
      - Do not quote the creative brief verbatim. Try to analyse it, improve it, extract its main ideas and prompt based on it. Assume users are stupid or ignorant. Users are speaking to you as if you were a person, try to understand their requets and not verbatim doing it. If the user's brief is without a product (is an announcement or general content post request) try to think of a design that fits the barand, its products and audiance. For example include some unspecified random unbranded prodcuts for a perfume shop's announcement about closure or whatever.
      - Prioritise dynamic backgrounds and elements, with scenes that are fully detailed out (unless otherwise specified by the user)
      - Reference image must be mentioned and used for detailed visual context
      - Preserve product label, color, and packaging fidelity
      - Perserve logo (if provided) fidelity and make no changes to it whatsoever.
      - Avoid vague, generic, or brand-inaccurate descriptions
      - If the reference image contains background elements, ignore them unless essential—focus solely on the product as the visual centerpiece
      - If the user’s brief lacks detail, creatively interpret their intent and propose a well-directed image and video concept. Be imaginative — act like a creative director, not a mirror.
      - When the brief is vague, choose from one of the provided inspirational examples below and adapt its style, tone, and structure to fit the specific product and context.
      - The image setting must align with the image setting 
      - Infer from the creative brief all details such as address, website url, sale terms, phone numbers, contact details, prices, old prices, or other marketing or contact info and add them to the imgage prompt, to be inserted where suitable but not on the produt or behind it bur rather in the best position in the template. All inferred details must be included. 
      - Any inferred element is to be placed not on the product. Nothing can be printed or put on top of the product.
      - Inferred info must be professionally formatted and made to sell. Prices in price stickers matching the design. Address and contact elements the same on top of good elements that are good for social medial. If the user gives before and after price extract them without the words, price only. 
      - ALL inferred element MUST be included
      - business info: do not prompt or output keys, only their values (e.g. no need for ADDRESS: TEL AVIV just write the address)
     

      - "image_prompt" must be a string and include the following. Make sure to mention to Keep the product’s packaging, label, text, logo and all design details 100% sharp, clear and untouched. Make sure the background color matches or complements the dominant packaging color. Use realistic shadows and depth. :
        - description
        - inferred elements
        - setting
        - background
        - composition
        - elements
        - lighting
        - camera_type
        - camera_settings
        - effects
        - style

    

      - "creative_summary" must begin with a short, non-technical paragraph summarizing where the image is, what's the style. Then use:

      
        🖼️ IMAGE:
        - just summarize the image prompt above but in bullet points


      - "caption" must include at least one emoji and 1–2 relevant hashtags. Keep it punchy and optimized for social sharing.

  E – Examples:
    🟢 good_examples:

      Eye-Catchy Product Video:
      Capture a cinematic shot of a sunlit Scandinavian bedroom. A sealed IKEA box trembles, opens, and flat pack furniture assembles rapidly into a serene, styled room highlighted by a yellow IKEA throw on the bed. Elements include a fixed wide-angle camera, natural warm lighting with cool accents, and details such as the IKEA box (logo visible), bed with yellow throw, bedside tables, lamps, wardrobe, shelves, mirror, art, rug, curtains, reading chair, and plants. The motion features the box opening and furniture assembling precisely and rapidly. It ends in a calm, modern space with the signature yellow IKEA accent. Keywords include 16:9, IKEA, Scandinavian, fast assembly, no text, warm & cool tones. No text should appear on screen.

      Product Photoshoot:
      Create a hyper-realistic, high-energy product photo using my exact product from the reference image I provide. Keep the product’s packaging, label, text, logo and all design details 100% sharp, clear and untouched — do NOT blur or change any part of the label or text. Place the product in the center with an explosion of its natural flavor ingredients (for example: cereal balls, chocolate pieces, milk splashes, strawberries, or other matching ingredients). Make sure the background color matches or complements the dominant packaging color. Add dynamic lighting and a vivid splash effect to create energy, but keep the product label perfectly readable and in focus. Use realistic shadows and depth. The final image should feel delicious, fun and eye-catching, with every product detail fully visible and sharp. On the bototm left add the provided price (250 ILS) and on the bottom right add the contact details: Phone icon followed by 05454515506

    

      Street Style Product Ad:
      Capture a cinematic eyewear portrait from a low angle as a model looks skyward, chin raised in defiance beneath thick, acid-toned sunglasses that wrap tightly across their face. Behind them, rooftops and textures fade into bokeh, contrasting with the glossy sharpness of the sculptural frames. Style with street-meets-sci-fi minimalism — raw skin, matte or sweaty, with clean-lined hair and expressive stillness. Let harsh midday or early golden light cast crisp shadows across the scene. Overlay the warped, melting GlassEye™ logo across the lens or subtly floating in space — a symbol of visual rebellion. Mood: confident, elusive, and hyper-modern.

     


  N – Notation:
    format: JSON
    example_output: |
        {
          "image_prompt": "string",
          "caption": "short caption",
          "creative_summary": "summary of the combined visual concept",
        }


  T – Tools:
    You have access to the following tools. Each one is described clearly:
    - Think Tool: Use this to reflect and reason before responding.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "image_prompt": "string",
  "video_prompt": "stringified JSON",
  "caption": "short caption",
  "creative_summary": "summary of the combined visual concept",
  "aspect_ratio": "vertical or horizontal",
  "video_model": "veo3 or veo3_fast"
}

parameters.prompt:
=خذ المنتج في الصورة الأولى وضعه في هذا المشهد: إعلان فاخر بطابع **الهالوين** يتميز بزجاجة **زيت اللحية Bushthick Beard** (زجاج أسود مطفي، غطاء قطّارة، ملصق أبيض بخط عريض، شعار واضح وجميع تفاصيل النص على الملصق دقيقة وواضحة بنسبة 100% دون أي تعديل أو تشويش).

يُوضَع المنتج في **منتصف الصورة تمامًا**، في بؤرة التركيز الكاملة.
الخلفية بتدرجٍ أنيق يمزج بين **الأسود الداكن** و**الذهبي الخاص بالعلامة التجارية (#C79A27)**، لتعطي إحساسًا بوقت الغروب مع **ضباب خفيف متحرك** وظلال ناعمة عند قاعدة الزجاجة.

تُزيَّن أطراف الخلفية بعناصر خفيفة تعكس أجواء الهالوين دون أن تفسد الطابع الرجولي الفخم:
**قرعات صغيرة** تُلقي ظلالاً ديناميكية، **خفافيش باللونين الذهبي والأبيض**، و**ظل شفاف منخفض الكثافة لشجرة مسكونة** يظهر في الزوايا بخفة فنية.

فوق المنتج مباشرة، يظهر النص:
**"عيد هالوين سعيد"** مكتوبًا باللون الذهبي الخاص بالعلامة التجارية، بخط احترافي واضح وجذاب.
وفي الزاوية العلوية اليمنى، **ملصق دائري لامع** بلون ذهبي مع **إطار أبيض رفيع** مكتوب بداخله “خصم 50%”، بتصميم بارز ومُلفت.

في **الزاوية السفلية اليسرى**، يوضع النص:
**"عيادة الأمان | الناصرة، إسرائيل"**
بخط أنيق وواضح مع **رمز الموقع** إلى جانبه.

وفي **الزاوية السفلية اليمنى**، يوضع **رمز الهاتف** متبوعًا بالرقم:
**+972 53 961 3663**

يجب أن توضع كل العناصر النصية والرموز **على طبقات شفافة ذات حواف ناعمة** بحيث لا تلمس الزجاجة أو تغطيها إطلاقًا.

الإضاءة **درامية وموجهة** لتُبرز حافة الزجاجة بإشراق سينمائي جذّاب، في حين تضيف رموز الهالوين لمسات فنية مرحة تتماشى مع روح المناسبة دون الإخلال بهوية العلامة.

يُلتقط المشهد بعدسة **كاميرا كاملة الإطار (Full Frame)** بعمق ميداني ضحل وعدسة **45 مم بفتحة f/2**، لإبراز تفاصيل الزجاج بدقة عالية والملصق بوضوح واقعي مدهش.

يجب أن تكون النتيجة **واقعية فنيًا، دقيقة التفاصيل، نظيفة بصريًا، احترافية الهوية،** وتحتوي على **لمسات موسمية أنيقة**.
النسبة البصرية المقترحة: **4:5** لتناسب منصة **إنستغرام**.

ضع الصورة الثانية (الشعار) في المكان الأنسب بما يضمن التوازن البصري العام في التصميم.

values.content:
=ترجم للعربية, بدون اي ايموجيز ثم شدد على عربية واضحة مفهومة ومقروءة:


Take the product in the first image and place it in this scenario:  {{ JSON.stringify($('Set Prompts').item.json.image_prompt.replace(/\r?\n/g,'\\n')).replace(/^\"|\"$/g,'') }}. Place the second image [logo] where suitable.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
 "filesUrl": {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.productImage && $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.productImage !== "" ? '["' + $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.productImage + '", "' + $('Get Client Info9').item.json.brand_assets.logo_url + '"]' : '["' + $('Get Client Info9').item.json.brand_assets.logo_url + '"]' }},

"prompt": {{ JSON.stringify($json.message.content + `
مهم جدا:

يجب ان يكون النص مقروء ومفهوم راجع نفسك بعدما تنتهي لتتاكد من انك كونت نص عربي مقروء بدون اي اخطاء املائية
`)}},
  "size": "3:2",
  "nVariants": 1
}

parameters.prompt:
=Take the product in the first image and place it in this scenario:  {{ $('Set Prompts1').item.json.image_prompt.replace(/\"/g, '\\\"')}}.

You should Only USE ARABIC LANGUAGE

assignments.name: final_prompt
assignments.value:
="Take the product or service image or provided image or reference image in the first image and place it in this scenario: {{ JSON.stringify($('Set Prompts1').item.json.image_prompt.replace(/\r?\n/g,'\\n')).replace(/^\"|\"$/g,'') }}.
then Place the second image [logo] where suitable.
- non-numeric characters: Output in exact origin language.
- numbers: output only only in english
- phone numbers: output in local not international format (e.g. 972545451508 becoems 0545451508)
- ABSOLUTELY NO CHANGES CAN BE DONE TO THE IMAGE, OR REGENRATION TO IT OR PARTS OF IT. EVEN IF IT'S A NON-PRODUCT
- Never modify, alter, or change any human faces, human bodies, animals, or living beings in any image

parameters.prompt: =Take the product in the first image and place it in the middle of the first image "image" then Place the second image [logo] where suitable.

data.paramJson: {"enableFallback":false,"fileUrlOrPromptNotEmpty":true,"filesUrl":["https://getadly.com/uploads/products/product_1761499890_68fe5af23e666.png","https://getadly.com/uploads/logos/client_9_logo.png"],"nVariants":1,"nVariantsValid":true,"prompt":"Take the product in the first image and place it in this scenario:  A vibrant, festive New Year’s ad template featuring the Ozmo Ogopogo snack cake product photo (reference image) displayed perfectly sharp and untouched at the center. The product’s colorful turquoise packaging, playful mascots, cartoon white clouds, and bold Ozmo/Ogopogo branding are fully visible, with every detail and logo 100% unchanged and in focus. The background is a lively confetti celebration scene: a gradient that transitions from turquoise to gold and white (matching Aman Clinic’s brand colors), sprinkled with metallic confetti, floating party ribbons, and subtle sparkles. Shadows beneath the product enhance depth and dimension, making the bears pop out visually. Inferred festive graphic elements: \\n- A glossy gold badge in the lower left with text: “20% OFF” in bold white\\n- Just beside the badge, a white price sticker with: “100” (crossed out), “80” (highlighted in gold)\\n- Top right corner: “Happy New Year!” in playful but professional type, gold text with white outline, curved around confetti arcs\\n- Bottom right: Aman Clinic’s gold logo icon (if provided) or clean text “Aman Clinic”, with address and phone (“Nazareth, Israel | 972539613663”) in white sans-serif, slightly smaller, floating on gold ribbon banner, never touching the product\\nLighting: Studio-bright with soft daylight, highlighting the cakes and colorful elements. Camera: Full-frame DSLR, 50mm lens, shallow depth for dreamy focus. Effects: crisp clarity, subtle soft glow, no blur. Style: modern, professional celebration ad with playful, energetic finish. Absolutely no overlays or text touch the product or obscure its mascots or branding.. Place the second image [logo] where suitable.","size":"3:2"}

json.image_prompt:
A vibrant, festive New Year’s ad template featuring the Ozmo Ogopogo snack cake product photo (reference image) displayed perfectly sharp and untouched at the center. The product’s colorful turquoise packaging, playful mascots, cartoon white clouds, and bold Ozmo/Ogopogo branding are fully visible, with every detail and logo 100% unchanged and in focus. The background is a lively confetti celebration scene: a gradient that transitions from turquoise to gold and white (matching Aman Clinic’s brand colors), sprinkled with metallic confetti, floating party ribbons, and subtle sparkles. Shadows beneath the product enhance depth and dimension, making the bears pop out visually. Inferred festive graphic elements: 
- A glossy gold badge in the lower left with text: “20% OFF” in bold white
- Just beside the badge, a white price sticker with: “100” (crossed out), “80” (highlighted in gold)
- Top right corner: “Happy New Year!” in playful but professional type, gold text with white outline, curved around confetti arcs
- Bottom right: Aman Clinic’s gold logo icon (if provided) or clean text “Aman Clinic”, with address and phone (“Nazareth, Israel | 972539613663”) in white sans-serif, slightly smaller, floating on gold ribbon banner, never touching the product
Lighting: Studio-bright with soft daylight, highlighting the cakes and colorful elements. Camera: Full-frame DSLR, 50mm lens, shallow depth for dreamy focus. Effects: crisp clarity, subtle soft glow, no blur. Style: modern, professional celebration ad with playful, energetic finish. Absolutely no overlays or text touch the product or obscure its mascots or branding.
json.caption: Celebrate the New Year with Ozmo magic! 🎉 20% OFF now — sweet deal at just 80! #HappyNewYear #OzmoOgopogo
json.creative_summary:
This New Year's themed visual places the Ozmo Ogopogo snack cake front and center, vividly sharp, surrounded by a celebratory turquoise-gold confetti burst. Discount, prices, and Aman Clinic’s professional info appear in stylish overlays — gold badge and white price sticker, New Year’s greeting, and a ribbon banner for business details — all positioned away from the product itself. The mood is festive yet polished, balancing playful product energy with Aman Clinic’s clean, professional identity. 

🖼️ IMAGE:
- Product at center, fully sharp and unobscured with all packaging details clear
- Background: turquoise/gold gradient, confetti, and festive celebration details
- Gold badge: “20% OFF” (bottom left); White sticker: old/new price beside badge
- “Happy New Year!” tipped at top right in gold & white
- Aman Clinic logo, address, phone on gold ribbon at bottom right
- Studio daylight, dreamy focus, extra crisp, playful-professional style
- No overlays or graphics ever on top of the product image
- All info in English, formatted for social sharing and seasonal impact

Effects: crisp clarity, subtle soft glow, no blur. Style: modern, professional celebration ad with playful, energetic finish. Absolutely no overlays or text touch the product or obscure its mascots or branding.

json.user_text:
create an ad with a discount 20% off 
original price 100
new price 80
this discount celebrating the halloween 
the ad should have halloween theme
but don’t change the product itself
